title: SpaceRole enum makes invalid roles a compile error — type system enforces the contract
description: Replacing role: &str with role: SpaceRole in upsert_space_member_with_role and SpaceMemberOp::Upsert moves the validation from a runtime precondition (documented in a doc comment that callers had to read) to the type system. Before this, any call site that passed an arbitrary &str would silently store garbage in the DB. Now passing an arbitrary string is a compile error. A contributor might suggest reverting to &str for 'flexibility' — resist this; the compile error is the point.
